bullets.text: Combined ratio of 85.6 year-to-date through June; profitability remains strong despite soft market conditions limiting consumer shopping motivation.
Net premiums written grew 8% through June; growth slowing as low frequency stabilizes or reduces consumer rates, dampening shopping behavior that drives new business.
Approaching 10 million policies in force covering over 14 million drivers; Drive auto PIF up 7%, Direct auto up 14%, Commercial Auto up 13%, Special Lines up 16%.
Severity trends in most coverages are no longer fully offset by lower frequency; management is monitoring carefully and preparing for growth when conditions favor increased shopping.
Concierge claims expansion announced with about 50 new centers planned over two years; two sites opened in Q2 with four more planned before year-end; improved center design achieved.
New billing system and claims management platform deployment on track; data center in Colorado Springs broke ground, expected operational in 2007; policy management system redesign underway.
Drive and Progressive Direct dual-brand strategy now nine months old and operating smoothly; Internet sales representing a growing majority of Direct new business activity.
